briefdescription.para: The following constants map to the XPAR parameters created in the xparameters.h file.

detaileddescription.para: They are defined here such that a user can easily change all the needed parameters in one place.

briefdescription.para: This function does a minimal test on the PRC device and driver as a design example.

parameterdescription.para: is the XPAR_<prc_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test the User Command.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.
is Instance of the GPIO attached to the PRC's Shift VSM.
is Instance of the GPIO attached to the PRC's Count VSM.

simplesect.para: This is only valid for this particular configuration of the PRC so it cannot be used in a general PRC test case. This is configuration dependent because each VSM has its own GPIO.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test the Restart with Status Command.

detaileddescription.para: Flip the VSM state and set a new RM. Check the status is as expected. Flip the VSM state back to what it was and set the original RM. Check the status is as expected

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test that we can set/get the Trigger to RM mapping registers.

detaileddescription.para: For each trigger allocated, set the value of the RM it will load.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: The width of this register is set by the number of allocated RMs, so we can't use any number greater than that or else it will alias.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test that we can set/get the BS Index registers.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test that we can set/get the RM Control registers.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: The RM Control register contains the following fields: Name | Min value | Max value | Shutdown Required | 0 | 3 | Startup Required | 0 | 1 | Reset Required | 0 | 3 | Reset Duration | 0 | 255 |

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test that we can set/get the BS Size registers.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to test that we can set/get the BS Address registers.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to Program the PRC.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

simplesect.para: For each allocated RM in each VSM, generate a partial bitstream and store it in memory. Program the PRC to point at it.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to Restart the VSMs.

parameterdescription.para: is the identifier of the VSM to access.

briefdescription.para: This is the main function to call the example.
This file contains an example using the XPrc driver to test the registers on the device.

detaileddescription.para:
None MODIFICATION HISTORY: Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ms 07/18/2016 First Release ms 04/05/2017 Modified comment lines notation in functions to avoid unnecessary description displayed while generating doxygen. 2.4 Arvd 02/04/2026 Fixed codespell errors
